name: Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc
summary: In this Annual Report on Form 10-K, unless otherwise indicated or the context otherwise requires, all references to we, our, us, Centessa, the Company, and our Company refer to Centessa Pharmaceuticals plc and its consolidated subsidiaries. Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering a new class of therapeutics in orexin-based neuroscience. We are developing a franchise of small molecule orexin receptor 2 (OX2R) agonists designed to address neuroscience diseases underpinned...
